claims.summary: High-entropy semantic trickle needs an explicit fidelity readout so smoothing does not hide flattened meaning.
claims.rationale: Implemented optional `semantic_fidelity_score` and `semantic_fidelity_state` on `PressureTrendSmoothingV1` with high-entropy preserved/thin tests.

claims.summary: Existing pressure-trend smoothing should still surface semantic coherence, semantic viscosity, and entropy handoff without changing pressure control.
claims.rationale: Verified the full `pressure_trend_smoothing` test filter, covering semantic coherence, high-entropy ballast, fast thinning, persistence, and drift separation.

claims.summary: Changing smoothing behavior to prioritize semantic trickle over pressure risk would be a live behavior change.
claims.rationale: Explicit authority gate: this run implemented a diagnostic truth channel only. No pressure smoothing priority or control behavior changed.
